name: 맥스 아쿠아블루
scalePrompt: a large bean bag sofa as long as an adult is tall (170cm) - long enough for a grown-up to lie down on fully; stood upright it stands taller than a 160cm woman, topping her head by about 10cm
notes: 메인 라운지. 가족 CF: 임신기 쉼 → 아기 라운저 → 엔딩. 10주년 아쿠아 색상. · MAX · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 이너 폴리에스터 87%/스판덱스 13% · 충전재 EPS·HRF·Mixed Foam · 연출: stands upright as a backrest chair or lies flat as a full-body lounger; a person can sit on, lean against, or lie across it; soft stretch fabric compresses under body weight

name: 서포트
scalePrompt: a U-shaped armrest cushion that wraps around an adult's lower back, armrests about hip-height when seated
notes: U자 팔걸이. 육아 서포트 — 엄마가 안에 앉아 아기 안는 구도(가족 CF CUT6). 360 스프라이트 44프레임. · SUPPORT · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 이너 폴리에스터 87%/스판덱스 13% · 충전재 EPS·HRF·Mixed Foam · 연출: U-shaped body pillow wrapping around a seated person's lower back, sides and arms; used alone or paired with a bean bag sofa; proven for parenting scenes (nursing, holding a baby)

name: 메가 문필로우
scalePrompt: a crescent moon-shaped pillow large enough to cradle a baby's head in its curve
notes: 초승달 수유/목베개. 원본 스프라이트는 아쿠아블루 — 올리브로 HSV 리컬러 후 락. 색상 9종 라인업. · 연출: crescent moon-shaped pillow; hugged or tucked under an arm or side; cradles a baby's head (proven in parenting cuts); sofa, bed, or floor

name: 메이트 옐리펀트
scalePrompt: a plush elephant toy about the size a baby can hug (roughly 30-40cm)
notes: 코끼리 플러시. 오렌지 귀 안감·다크그레이 발바닥. 아기 장난감 컷(가족 CF CUT7 전경·CUT8). · 연출: animal character plush; hugged by a child or placed nearby; works as a foreground prop or bokeh accent

notes: SQUEEZIBO · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 충전재 플라스틱 고무 99%/폴리에틸렌 1% · 연출: palm-sized squishy character cushion (plant, animal, solid designs); held and squeezed in one hand, or placed as a cute accent on a desk, sofa, or bedside; soft stretch fabric over a squishy malleable core

name: 서포트 올리브그린
scalePrompt: a U-shaped armrest cushion that wraps around an adult's lower back; its armrests reach about hip-height when the person is seated (94cm tall when upright)
notes: SUPPORT · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 이너 폴리에스터 87%/스판덱스 13% · 충전재 EPS·HRF·Mixed Foam · 연출: U-shaped body pillow wrapping around a seated person's lower back, sides and arms; used alone or paired with a bean bag sofa; proven for parenting scenes (nursing, holding a baby)

name: 미디 스톤
scalePrompt: a mid-size bean bag reaching an adult's chest when stood upright (125cm); one adult can curl up on it lying down, or sit with full back support
notes: MIDI · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 이너 폴리에스터 87%/스판덱스 13% · 충전재 EPS·HRF·Mixed Foam · 연출: mid-size vertical bean bag sofa (smaller than Max, larger than Mini); solo relaxation with balanced sitting, leaning and lying

name: 미니 라이트그레이

notes: MINI · 겉커버 면 89%/스판덱스 11% · 이너 폴리에스터 87%/스판덱스 13% · 충전재 EPS·HRF·Mixed Foam · 연출: compact single-person bean bag; sitting or leaning poses close to the floor; fits small rooms and corners
